Front Desk Officer Job at Elimtop View Estate Limited




        
    

        
        Elimtop View Estate Limited is a premier real estate firm dedicated to delivering secure, verified, and high-value property development and land investment solutions in Port Harcourt, Rivers State, Nigeria

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Requirement
     

            
    




	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, contact: 09070070008.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Assistant",
  "description": "MDHR Consult is a Human Resources and Business Consulting firm based in Suncity Estate, Abuja, dedicated to helping organizations build high-performing teams and supporting job seekers in achieving their career goals. Our services include recruitment and selection, job application support, HR advisory, business consulting, and training and development. Our mission is to deliver innovative training programs and HR best practices through experienced HR professionals, meeting the evolving needs of individuals and organizations. We foster a culture of professionalism, collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning, offering talented individuals the opportunity to grow, make an impact, and build rewarding careers with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant

Job Location: Suncity / Apo Mechanic Estate, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our service company is seeking for a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to provide direct administrative and operational support to the CEO.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide high-level administrative support to the CEO.
	Handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism.
	Follow up on tasks, deadlines, and deliverables on behalf of the CEO.
	Support daily operationsas assigned by the CEO.
	Discharge any other responsibilities as assigned by the CEO.


Requirements


	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	High level of discretion, professionalism, and reliability.
	Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work with minimal supervision.
	Driving Skills is an added advantage.
	Must be based in Abuja and able to resume immediately.


Salary and Benefits


	N80,000 - N100,000 / month.
	Transport Stipend.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV &amp; Cover Letter as one document to: mdhrconsult@gmail.com using your name, position and location as the email subject.",

Executive Assistant Job at MDHR Consult




        
    

        
        MDHR Consult is a Human Resources and Business Consulting firm based in Suncity Estate, Abuja, dedicated to helping organizations build high-performing teams and supporting job seekers in achieving their career goals. Our services include recruitment and selection, job application support, HR advisory, business consulting, and training and development. Our mission is to deliver innovative training programs and HR best practices through experienced HR professionals, meeting the evolving needs of individuals and organizations. We foster a culture of professionalism, collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning, offering talented individuals the opportunity to grow, make an impact, and build rewarding careers with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

            
    



Job Position: Executive Assistant

Job Location: Suncity / Apo Mechanic Estate, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our service company is seeking for a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to provide direct administrative and operational support to the CEO.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide high-level administrative support to the CEO.
	Handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism.
	Follow up on tasks, deadlines, and deliverables on behalf of the CEO.
	Support daily operationsas assigned by the CEO.
	Discharge any other responsibilities as assigned by the CEO.


Requirements


	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	High level of discretion, professionalism, and reliability.
	Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work with minimal supervision.
	Driving Skills is an added advantage.
	Must be based in Abuja and able to resume immediately.


Salary and Benefits


	N80,000 - N100,000 / month.
	Transport Stipend.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV & Cover Letter as one document to: [email protected] using your name, position and location as the email subject.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media & Digital Marketing Officer",
  "description": "Talent Source Nigeria is a Talent Acquisition and Management firm. It operates as a Human Capital Management Consultancy firm, with a high stake in recruitment processes, talent training and development strategies and also in Human Resources Advisory based on best practices. We prioritize building employee retention and engagement process plan for organization for employee life cycle sustainability.

Our firm is piloted by a team of experienced, exceptional management strategy professionals with robust faculty of erudite facilitators who are distinguished and seasoned professionals in their various fields of specialization.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media &amp; Digital Marketing Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking an experienced, dynamic, and results-driven Social Media &amp; Digital Marketing Officer to run our social media, shoot and edit photo/video content, cover events, and support digital marketing across our group of businesses withinthe online space.
	We want someone creative, organised, and comfortable handling the camera, create appealing content and lead different marketing campaign online targeting corporate clients, social guest and travelers looking for a safe, luxurious and relaxing environment for staycation.


Responsibilities


	We are looking for a full-time Social Media &amp; Digital Marketing Specialistto take ownership of our content and online presence. You will work closely with management.
	Plan, shoot, and edit photo and video content for Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook.
	Create fun, engaging content featuring our staff, facilities, food, pool, and events.
	Be present to cover guest events, parties, and hotel activities as they happen.
	Manage our social media pages, schedule posts, and respond to comments and direct messages.
	Design simple flyers and promotional materials.
	Support marketing and brand strategy discussions with the management team.
	Occasionally, support media work for our affiliated businesses in retail, fashion, and equipment.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 2-4 years of experience.
	Strong skills in photography and videography, including shooting on a phone or camera.
	Confident video editing for social media. A good eye for content that stands out, not just standard hotel photos.
	Very conversant with Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and current content trends.
	Organised, reliable, and able to manage several tasks at once.
	Comfortable working flexible hours, including some evenings and weekends when events run.
	Good communication skills and a friendly, professional manner with guests and partners.
	Experience in hospitality or a similar fast-paced environment is an advantage.
	Knowledge ofSEO processess will be an added advantage
	Website management skills are also an advantage.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary.
	Career growth and professional development opportunities.
	Positive and collaborative work environment.
	Opportunity to work with a reputable hospitality brand.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Social Media & Digital Marketing Officer Job at Talent Source Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Talent Source Nigeria is a Talent Acquisition and Management firm. It operates as a Human Capital Management Consultancy firm, with a high stake in recruitment processes, talent training and development strategies and also in Human Resources Advisory based on best practices. We prioritize building employee retention and engagement process plan for organization for employee life cycle sustainability.

Our firm is piloted by a team of experienced, exceptional management strategy professionals with robust faculty of erudite facilitators who are distinguished and seasoned professionals in their various fields of specialization.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media & Digital Marketing Officer
     

            
    



Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking an experienced, dynamic, and results-driven Social Media & Digital Marketing Officer to run our social media, shoot and edit photo/video content, cover events, and support digital marketing across our group of businesses withinthe online space.
	We want someone creative, organised, and comfortable handling the camera, create appealing content and lead different marketing campaign online targeting corporate clients, social guest and travelers looking for a safe, luxurious and relaxing environment for staycation.


Responsibilities


	We are looking for a full-time Social Media & Digital Marketing Specialistto take ownership of our content and online presence. You will work closely with management.
	Plan, shoot, and edit photo and video content for Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook.
	Create fun, engaging content featuring our staff, facilities, food, pool, and events.
	Be present to cover guest events, parties, and hotel activities as they happen.
	Manage our social media pages, schedule posts, and respond to comments and direct messages.
	Design simple flyers and promotional materials.
	Support marketing and brand strategy discussions with the management team.
	Occasionally, support media work for our affiliated businesses in retail, fashion, and equipment.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 2-4 years of experience.
	Strong skills in photography and videography, including shooting on a phone or camera.
	Confident video editing for social media. A good eye for content that stands out, not just standard hotel photos.
	Very conversant with Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and current content trends.
	Organised, reliable, and able to manage several tasks at once.
	Comfortable working flexible hours, including some evenings and weekends when events run.
	Good communication skills and a friendly, professional manner with guests and partners.
	Experience in hospitality or a similar fast-paced environment is an advantage.
	Knowledge ofSEO processess will be an added advantage
	Website management skills are also an advantage.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary.
	Career growth and professional development opportunities.
	Positive and collaborative work environment.
	Opportunity to work with a reputable hospitality brand.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: [email protected] using "Social Media & Digital Marketing Officer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Customer Service Representative Job at R & R Recruiting Services
content:
R & R Recruiting Services is a Recruitment Agency, Training, Consulting & Human Resources Management Company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative
Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Attend to walk-in and online customers professionally.
	Handle inquiries, complaints, and customer requests.
	Process orders and follow up on customer concerns.
	Maintain customer records and provide feedback reports.
	Ensure excellent customer satisfaction at all times.


Qualification


	Minimum of B.Sc. Degree or HND.


Requirements:


	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Customer-focused and solution-oriented mindset.
	Good knowledge of Microsoft Office applications.


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information WhatsApp: 09035411252.    

    

        Click here to Apply
